issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for tool failures and network issues.
The skill is tightly coupled to the OpenAI Agents SDK, limiting portability to other AI agent frameworks.

scenarios.name: Customer support triage with handoffs and input guardrail
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used generic agent framework patterns and missed openai-agents SDK primitives; treatment correctly used Agent with handoffs, @function_tool, Runner.run, and InputGuardrail/GuardrailFunctionOutput with tripwire_triggered.

scenarios.name: Stream agent output and surface handoff events
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced generic async streaming without SDK-specific event types; treatment used Runner.run_streamed and inspected agent_updated_stream_event and raw_response_event as documented.
